steps.title: Isolate $y$
steps.content: The equation is $$y-57=px.$$ Add $57$ to both sides to undo the subtraction.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice B is correct. Choice A attaches $57$ to $x$ incorrectly, while choices C and D use multiplication or division by $57$ even though the original equation subtracts $57$.
